snippet: I'm looking forward to working together.
original:
Alana, I noticed icapps' "Think, Build and Care" approach to end-to-end
digital products-from custom software to mobile apps for large partners.

I'm Alban at Cronos. We work with teams building future-proof products and
help streamline delivery when projects need extra momentum (capacity,
focus, or execution support).

Open to a quick 15-minute chat to see if there's any area in your current
pipeline where an extra pair of hands would be useful?

subject: Re: Quick question, Lander
original:
De Cronos Groep has scaled from Kontich to five continents, serving ~5,000
customers and backing 600+ companies.

I'm Alban at Cronos. Curious how you decide which new technology
initiatives (or early-stage investments) are worth prioritizing across such
a broad portfolio.

Would it be crazy to compare notes for 10 minutes to see if there's a fit
for a lightweight collaboration?

subject: Re: Helping ALDI Belgium stay lean at 440+ stores
Re: Think, Build and Care.. I guess
original:
Hi Alana,

Seeing how icapps embodies the "Think, Build and Care" motto to deliver
custom software-like the mobile app for Belgium's largest bank-really stood
out to me.

At Cronos, we collaborate with leading digital agencies to support
scalable tech and development projects.

Would you be open to a brief chat to see if we could be a valuable partner
for your team?

Best,
Alban
